title: IIT Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor Posts
post_name: Assistant Professor (Grade I/II), Associate Professor, Professor
short_info: The latest Indian Institute of Technology Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 has been officially announced for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor positions! Published on 06 April 2026 at ecampus.iitd.ac.in, this rolling recruitment drive offers multiple openings across various departments. Eligible candidates, with qualifications ranging from Ph.D. in relevant fields and possessing a minimum of 3 to 10 years of experience depending on the post, can apply online from 17 April 2026 to 30 June 2026 (23:59 PM IST). Find all details about the IIT Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026, inc

age_limit.age_details: Preferably below 35 years for Assistant Professor (Grade I/II)

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in the preceding degree + Relevant Experience
qualification.details: Publication Standards | Assistant Professor: At least 4 refereed papers (minimum 2 in reputed journals). Associate Professor: At least 10 refereed papers (minimum 4 in reputed journals; 2 in last 3 years). Professor: At least 20 refereed papers (minimum 8 in reputed journals; 3 in last 4 years).

selection_process: The selection process is merit-based and involves the following stages:
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit applications through the online portal.
Registration: Visit the recruitment portal at ecampus.iitd.ac.in/IITDFR-0/login.
Separate Applications: A separate application must be filled if applying to more than one academic unit.
Application Submission: Complete the data sheet and upload the combined Academic Profile PDF.
